current.mission: Become the leading B2B workflow automation platform for mid-market companies by delivering reliable, extensible, and easy-to-adopt solutions.

strategic_pillars.name: Grow Core Platform
strategic_pillars.description: Increase adoption and retention of the core workflow engine through reliability, performance, and feature depth

strategic_pillars.name: Expand Integrations
strategic_pillars.description: Build a partner ecosystem with third-party integrations and an open API to increase platform stickiness

strategic_pillars.name: Enter New Segments
strategic_pillars.description: Extend the platform into adjacent verticals (healthcare ops, logistics) with minimal customization

objectives.objective: Launch public API with 15 partner integrations
objectives.target: Public API GA with 15 certified partners
SOC 2 Type II audit passed by Q3 2026

current.market_context: Mid-market workflow automation is growing at 25% CAGR. Key competitors raising Series B/C rounds. Customers increasingly expect open APIs and pre-built integrations. SOC 2 is now table stakes for enterprise deals. Healthcare vertical showing strong inbound interest but requires compliance investment.
